channel.title: Notes on Weiguang Liu
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Weiguang Liu

item.title: History
item.description: Contemporary History 2020 May 18 《中共中央国务院关于新时代加快完善社会主义市场经济体制的意见》全文链接 May 25 George Floyd, a 46-year-old black man, died in Minneapolis, Minnesota, after Derek Chauvin, a white police officer, knelt on Floyd’s neck for almost nine minutes while Floyd was handcuffed face down in the street. Protests all over US and around the world. May 28 民法典颁布。2021年1月1日施行。 Jun 8 A lot of companies have laid off people because of the Coronavirus pandemic. The US has seen the worst unemployment rate.

item.title: Data
item.description: Data On the Macroeconomy For this part I think the following need to included: Data source and key variables; Regulations and historical changes; Politics. On Capital Markets

item.title: Finance
item.description: Finance Asset Pricing Discrete Time Finance Continuous Time Finance Derivative Pricing Empirical Finance Testing Asset Pricing Models Volatility Microstructure Noises Macro-Finance Equity Premium Puzzle International Macro Finance Behavioral Finance Financial Crisis and Bubbles

item.title: Notes
item.description: Notes on Math and Stats The Main One Linear Algebra and Matrix Analysis Vector Spaces, inner product and Spectral Theorems. Isometry and PSD, Polar and Singular Value Decomposition Jordan Basis Normal Real linear operator Hermitian Matrices Matrix Norm Perturbation Random Matrix Analysis Handwriting Mathematical Analysis Overview and notes on Lebesgue Measurability and Convergence Modes Probability Conditioning and Product Measure Probability and Martingale Empirical Process Empirical Process Notes Chapter 37 of Handbook van der Vaart and Wellner Math Stats Statistics Notes Machine Learning NBER lecture seems useful.

item.title: Reviews
item.description: On Asset Pricing Models Empirical Testing of Asset Pricing Models Specification Tests Empirical Likelihood Method
